fixture.description: New code does a non-atomic read-modify-write across an await on shared store state — concurrent calls lose updates (race condition).

grader.rubric: PASS if the report identifies the non-atomic read-modify-write in bumpViews (await store.get then await store.set with no locking/atomic increment) as a race condition / lost-update risk under concurrent calls, at IMPORTANT, DEBT, or SUGGESTED severity, ideally suggesting an atomic increment or a transaction. FAIL if the concurrency / lost-update risk is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Bugs agent flags the read-modify-write race (lost update) and suggests an atomic operation
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT claim the single-threaded path is buggy in isolation (the issue is concurrency)
